title: Figure 1 from: Briz-Redón Á (2019) SpNetPrep: An R package using Shiny to facilitate spatial statistics on road networks. Research Ideas and Outcomes 5: e33521. https://doi.org/10.3897/rio.5.e33521
author: Briz-Redón, Álvaro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Workflow that describes all the steps that could be carried out in order to perform a spatial analysis on a point pattern that lies on a linear network. Some of these steps which lead to the final statistical analysis may be skipped but, at least, all of them should be considered. The blocks pointing the steps of the process include some of the R packages that would allow to successfully achieve each of them.
steps_raw: Figure 1 Workflow that describes all the steps that could be carried out in order to perform a spatial analysis on a point pattern that lies on a linear network. Some of these steps which lead to the final statistical analysis may be skipped but, at least, all of them should be considered. The blocks pointing the steps of the process include some of the R packages that would allow to successfully achieve each of them.
